### Key Findings:

| # | Workstream | Status | Key Observations |
|---|-----------|--------|----------------|
| 1A | Corporate Registry | ✅ | Founded 2007 (Mar 1). RMB 20M fully paid. 26 employees. RMB 4.615B revenue (2024). "Red Triangle" brand dates to 1917. |
| 2A | Beneficial Ownership | ✅ | **Tianjin SASAC** = true UBO. Du Daosheng is state-appointed director, not private UBO. Transparent SOE chain. |
| 3A | Sanctions Screening | ✅ | **Clean across all lists** — OFAC SDN, BIS Entity/MEU, NS-CMIC, UFLPA. Parent group also clean. |
| 4A | Adverse Media | ✅ | Minor — 18 total court records (mostly contract disputes). No bankruptcies, dishonesty listings, or enforcement. |
| 5A | Litigation | ✅ | 2018 contract dispute with Liaoning Huaxin — resolved via appeal. Minor commercial disputes expected for trading company. |
| 6A | PEP Check | ⚠️ | Du Daosheng, Ding Aihu, Xu Junkai = **de facto PEP** (SOE appointees). Standard for Chinese state-owned enterprises. |
| 7A | Trade Risk | ✅ LOW | Commercial chemical trading (soda ash, fertilizers, coal). No dual-use concerns. Hazardous chemical license held. |
| 8A | Risk Assessment | ✅ **Score: 1 (LOW RISK)** | Well-established, well-capitalized SOE. Clean sanctions. Minimal adverse media. Standard monitoring only. |
